title: vernonia johnstuttsii
intro: Vernonia johnstuttsii, also known as the Johnstutt's Ironweed, is a flowering plant species within the Asteraceae family, native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Vernonia johnstuttsii is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, where it is often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
